purpose: Separates oil from compressed air mixture and maintains air receiver pressure while providing clean compressed air output

inputs.name: compressed_air_oil_mixture
inputs.description: Compressed air with oil mixture input from compressor

outputs.name: air_receiver_pressure
outputs.description: Pressure maintained in the air receiver tank

outputs.name: separated_compressed_air
outputs.description: Clean compressed air output after oil separation

outputs.name: control_pressure
outputs.description: Control pressure signal for system regulation

states.name: oil_separator_element_condition
states.description: Oil separator element degradation due to contamination and usage

states.name: oil_quality
states.description: Oil quality degradation due to oxidation and contamination

states.name: carbon_deposits
states.description: Carbon deposit accumulation due to oil degradation and high temperature

events.name: oil_separator_clogged
events.description: Oil separator element becomes clogged reducing air output or pressure

events.name: excessive_carbon_deposits
events.description: Carbon deposits accumulate in discharge pipe and oil separator vessel

parameters.name: oil_separator_element_life
parameters.description: Expected operational life of oil separator element

parameters.name: oil_degradation_life
parameters.description: Expected operational life of oil before significant degradation

parameters.name: carbon_deposit_capacity
parameters.description: Maximum carbon deposit capacity before system impact

parameters.name: separation_efficiency_factor
parameters.description: Factor relating separator condition to separation efficiency

parameters.name: pressure_drop_factor
parameters.description: Factor for pressure drop across separator

parameters.name: control_pressure_ratio
parameters.description: Ratio of control pressure to air receiver pressure

parameters.name: oil_separator_clogged_threshold
parameters.description: Threshold for oil separator element condition failure

parameters.name: carbon_deposits_threshold
parameters.description: Threshold for excessive carbon deposits warning

state_transition_logic: oil_separator_element_condition decreases by (compressed_air_oil_mixture / oil_separator_element_life) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
oil_quality decreases by (compressed_air_oil_mixture / oil_degradation_life) * dt, clamped to [0.0, 1.0]
carbon_deposits increases by carbon_deposit_rate * (1.0 - oil_quality) * dt, clamped to [0.0, carbon_deposit_capacity]
assumptions: Oil separator element degradation is proportional to input pressure and operating time
Oil quality degrades due to thermal and oxidative stress from compressed air processing
Carbon deposits accumulate faster with degraded oil quality
Pressure drop across separator increases as element condition degrades
Oil temperature increases with degraded oil quality due to reduced heat transfer efficiency
Control pressure is proportional to air receiver pressure
